{"id":"smallhold-h0x","title":"SnowflakeGen: 64-bit time-sortable IDs, string-serialized","description":"Implement a thread-safe snowflake generator: 48 bits Unix milliseconds + 16 bits sequence counter. ~50 lines, no external dep. Critical invariant: ALL IDs serialize to/from JSON as strings because JavaScript cannot handle 64-bit integers. Mastodon client pagination depends on this being monotonically time-sortable.

Agent workflow: Spawn a research subagent to find edge cases in snowflake implementations (clock skew, sequence overflow, same-millisecond bursts). Spawn a testing subagent to write property-based tests independently.

Test discipline:
- Property test: generate 10,000 IDs, verify strict monotonic increase
- Concurrent test: spawn 16 threads each generating 1,000 IDs, collect all, verify no duplicates and all unique
- Serialization test: verify JSON output is a quoted string '"12345"' not a number 12345 — use serde_json::to_string and assert the result starts with '"'
- Cross-check: parse the string back to i64 and verify round-trip

Defensive programming:
- Sequence overflow (> 65535 in same millisecond): spin-wait until next millisecond — do NOT wrap
- Clock going backward: panic in dev/test, log + use last known good time in production
- i64 overflow at year ~10889: document, test that year 2030 IDs fit in i64","design":"struct SnowflakeGen(AtomicU64). generate() returns i64. Newtype Id(i64) with custom Serialize (as string) and Deserialize (from string or number). Store as i64 in DB, send as string in JSON.","acceptance_criteria":"10,000 IDs generated in tight loop are strictly monotonic; concurrent generation produces no duplicates; serde serializes as quoted string; fits in SQLite INTEGER (i64)","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:26:12Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:26:12Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-4vg","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:26:33Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
